fields.object_repr: Year-End Party: the name says it all
The Diary of a Young Girl
Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
Harry Potter and the Sorcerer’s Stone
The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo
Welcome Night Mixer: A casual gathering for newcomers to meet and connect with others over snacks and music.
Friday Hangout Night: Chill evening with games, music, and open conversations to unwind the week.
Inter-Department Basketball Game: Friendly basketball competition between departments showcasing teamwork and skill.
Morning Fitness Run: Community run to promote health and endurance for all participants.
Intro to Web Development: Hands-on workshop covering HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript for beginners.
Creative Writing Basics: Learn storytelling techniques and improve your writing skills through guided exercises.
Tech Innovation Summit: Talks and presentations on emerging technologies and digital transformation.
Education Futures Forum: Discussions on modern teaching methods and the future of learning systems.
Barangay Clean-Up Drive: Community effort to clean public spaces and promote environmental awareness.
Charity Food Fair: Food stalls and donations to support local families in need.
Portable Charger x1 for Ethan Reyes
Canvas Tote Bag x2 for Maya Santos
Sports Jacket x1 for Jane Doe

fields.name: Fiction
fields.description: Made-up stories created from the author’s imagination (novels, short stories).

fields.name: Non-Fiction
fields.description: Based on real facts, people, and events (biographies, history, self-help).

fields.name: Fantasy
fields.description: Stories with magic, mythical creatures, and imaginary worlds.

fields.name: Science Fiction
fields.description: Focuses on futuristic technology, space, and scientific possibilities.

fields.name: Mystery/Thriller
fields.description: Centers on solving crimes, secrets, and suspenseful situations.

fields.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
fields.author: Harper Lee
fields.synopsis: A young girl in the American South learns about racism and justice as her father defends a wrongly accused man.

fields.title: The Great Gatsby
fields.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
fields.synopsis: A mysterious millionaire throws lavish parties while secretly longing for a lost love.

fields.title: Pride and Prejudice
fields.author: Jane Austen
fields.synopsis: Elizabeth Bennet navigates love, class, and misunderstandings with Mr. Darcy.

fields.title: The Diary of a Young Girl
fields.author: Anne Frank
fields.synopsis: The real-life diary of a Jewish girl hiding during World War II.

fields.title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
fields.author: Yuval Noah Harari
fields.synopsis: Explains how humans evolved and shaped the modern world.

fields.title: Educated
fields.author: Tara Westover
fields.synopsis: A woman grows up in a strict family and pursues education despite many obstacles.

fields.title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer’s Stone
fields.author: J.K. Rowling
fields.synopsis: A boy discovers he is a wizard and begins his journey at a magical school.

fields.title: The Hobbit
fields.author: J.R.R. Tolkien
fields.synopsis: A hobbit goes on an adventure to reclaim treasure from a dragon.

fields.title: The Name of the Wind
fields.author: Patrick Rothfuss
fields.synopsis: A gifted young man tells the story of his rise to legend.

fields.title: Dune
fields.author: Frank Herbert
fields.synopsis: A young nobleman navigates politics and survival on a desert planet.

fields.title: Ender’s Game
fields.author: Orson Scott Card
fields.synopsis: A child genius is trained to lead humanity in a war against aliens.

fields.title: The Martian
fields.author: Andy Weir
fields.synopsis: An astronaut stranded on Mars uses science to survive.

fields.title: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo
fields.author: Stieg Larsson
fields.synopsis: A journalist and hacker investigate a long-missing woman.

fields.title: Gone Girl
fields.author: Gillian Flynn
fields.synopsis: A man becomes the main suspect when his wife disappears.

fields.title: The Da Vinci Code
fields.author: Dan Brown
fields.synopsis: A professor uncovers hidden secrets while solving a murder.

fields.title: A Powerful Story About Justice
fields.comment: This book clearly shows the impact of racism and fairness through a child’s perspective. It’s emotional and easy to understand.

fields.title: A Fun Adventure Journey
fields.comment: The story is exciting and full of adventure. The characters are interesting, and the journey keeps you engaged.

fields.title: Survival Against All Odds
fields.comment: A very smart and intense story about surviving alone on Mars. It mixes science and humor really well.

fields.name: Apparel
fields.description: Clothing items like shirts, hoodies, jackets, and caps.

fields.name: Accessories
fields.description: Wearables and add-ons like bags, pins, keychains, and bracelets.

fields.name: Stationery
fields.description: School or office items like notebooks, pens, stickers, and planners.

fields.name: Electronics
fields.description: Tech-related merch like headphones, USBs, and small gadgets.

fields.name: Collectibles
fields.description: Limited-edition items like figurines, posters, and fan merch items.

fields.name: Campus Hoodie
fields.description: Warm and comfy hoodie with minimalist university logo design.

fields.name: Classic White Shirt
fields.description: Soft cotton shirt perfect for everyday wear and events.

fields.name: Sports Jacket
fields.description: Lightweight jacket ideal for outdoor activities and sports events.

fields.name: Logo Keychain
fields.description: Durable acrylic keychain featuring the official merch logo.

fields.name: Canvas Tote Bag
fields.description: Eco-friendly tote bag for books, groceries, or daily essentials.

fields.name: Wristband Pack

fields.name: Study Notebook
fields.description: Lined notebook for school notes and daily journaling.

fields.name: Gel Pen Set
fields.description: Smooth-writing gel pens in assorted colors.

fields.name: Sticker Pack
fields.description: Fun decorative stickers for laptops, notebooks, and gadgets.

fields.name: Wireless Earbuds
fields.description: Compact earbuds with clear sound and long battery life.

fields.name: USB Flash Drive (32GB)
fields.description: Portable storage for files, documents, and media.

fields.name: Portable Charger
fields.description: Power bank for charging devices on the go.

fields.name: Mini Figure Set

fields.name: Event Poster Print
fields.description: High-quality poster featuring exclusive merch artwork.

fields.name: Collector Badge Set
fields.description: Set of enamel pins with rare merch designs.

fields.name: Social
fields.description: Where people gather to talk, laugh, and pretend they’re not checking their phones.

fields.name: Sports
fields.description: All about competition, teamwork, and occasional dramatic victories (or defeats).

fields.name: Workshops
fields.description: Learn something new… or at least leave feeling slightly more productive.

fields.name: Conferences
fields.description: Big ideas, long talks, and lots of nodding like you understand everything.

fields.name: Community Events
fields.description: Bringing people together for fun, causes, or just free food.
